Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows two exceptional performers dominating the long-term momentum rankings. EFXT ranks #1 with a score of 90.3, displaying powerful acceleration across timeframes (16.53% in 1 month escalating to 284.54% over 1 year), though momentum has decelerated at the 5-10 year horizon with a ratio of 0.63. FORM appears as the second entry with even more extreme returns—a stunning 1,873% over 10 years and 480.93% over 1 year—though its 5-year ratio of 0.42 suggests recent deceleration relative to its longer-term gains. Both tickers pass all four moving average filters (SMA 30/50/100/200), indicating sustained uptrends, though EFXT shows concerning negative performance versus QQQ over 10 years (-301.31%), suggesting it has dramatically underperformed tech. FORM's massive 10-year outperformance versus SPY (1,632.42%) is extraordinary but should be interpreted cautiously given the incomplete data in the second entry and the fact that such extreme historical returns are rare and may reflect survivorship or sector-specific dynamics.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
